typeProperties.script:
parameters{
	ArchiveUpdates as string (),
	FileName as string (),
	NewWeekLCM as integer (),
	Owner as string (),
	PrevWeekRC as integer (),
	sArchiveUpdates as string (),
	sFileLCMNew as string (),
	TimeStamp as string ()
}

source(output(
		ID as string,
		RAM_Server_Name as string,
		RT_Planned_Activity as string,
		Funding_Date as string,
		RT_Decom_Date as string,
		Normalized_OS as string,
		Environment as string,
		Target_Data_Center as string,
		Target_VM as string,
		Managed_by_Group as string,
		Primary_Application as string,
		Primary_Tech_MGR as string,
		CIO as string,
		CIO_Direct as string,
		CIO_Name as string,
		CIO_Direct_Name as string,
		CI_Status as string,
		Workstream as string,
		Norm_Site as string,
		Priority_Bucket as string,
		Application_IDs as string,
		Current_VM as string,
		Hweoldate as string,
		Oseoldate as string,
		PAA_Indicator as string,
		PAI_Indicator as string,
		Physical_or_Virtual as string,
		Product_Name as string,
		RT_Status as string
	),
	allowSchemaDrift: true,
	validateSchema: false) ~> FlatFileSource
FlatFileSource derive(Import_date = toString(currentDate())) ~> DerivedColumn
DerivedColumn sink(input(
		PAA_Indicator as string,
		RT_Planned_Activity as string,
		CIO_Name as string,
		Workstream as string,
		RAM_Server_Name as string,
		Managed_by_Group as string,
		Oseoldate as string,
		CI_Status as string,
		Norm_Site as string,
		Target_Data_Center as string,
		Target_VM as string,
		Normalized_OS as string,
		Priority_Bucket as string,
		Application_IDs as string,
		Primary_Application as string,
		Import_date as date 'dd-MM-yyyy',
		ID as string,
		CIO_Direct_Name as string,
		RT_Status as string,
		CIO as string,
		Product_Name as string,
		Hweoldate as string,
		PAI_Indicator as string,
		RT_Decom_Date as string,
		Primary_Tech_MGR as string,
		CIO_Direct as string,
		Current_VM as string,
		Environment as string,
		Physical_or_Virtual as string,
		Funding_Date as string
	),
	allowSchemaDrift: true,
	validateSchema: false,
	stagingSchemaName: 'dbo',
	saveOrder: 10000,
	insertable:true,
	deletable:false,
	upsertable:false,
	updateable:false,
	keys:[],
	mapColumn(
		PAA_Indicator,
		RT_Planned_Activity,
		CIO_Name,
		Workstream,
		RAM_Server_Name,
		Managed_by_Group,
		Oseoldate,
		CI_Status,
		Norm_Site,
		Target_Data_Center,
		Target_VM,
		Normalized_OS,
		Priority_Bucket,
		Application_IDs,
		Primary_Application,
		Import_date,
		ID,
		CIO_Direct_Name,
		RT_Status,
		CIO,
		Product_Name,
		Hweoldate,
		PAI_Indicator,
		RT_Decom_Date,
		Primary_Tech_MGR,
		CIO_Direct,
		Current_VM,
		Environment,
		Physical_or_Virtual,
		Funding_Date)) ~> OLEDBDestination
